ddls:
CREATE TABLE "content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the place where the content is stored */,
  "anno_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation attribute associated with the content */,
  "mime_type" TEXT /* MIME type of the content */,
  "content_data" TEXT /* Content data or reference to the content */,
  "flags" INTEGER /* Flags associated with the content */,
  "expiration" INTEGER /* Expiration date of the content */,
  "content_type" INTEGER /* Type of content (e.g., document, image, video) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Timestamp when the content was added */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the content */,
  "previous_version_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the previous version of the content */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent content (if any) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the content is active or not */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the content */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_flags FOREIGN KEY ("flags") REFERENCES content_flags ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_expiration FOREIGN KEY ("expiration") REFERENCES content_expiration ("expiration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_anno_attribute_id FOREIGN KEY ("anno_attribute_id") REFERENCES annotation_attributes ("anno_attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_place_id FOREIGN KEY ("place_id") REFERENCES places ("place_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "places" (
  "place_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each place */,
  "place_name" TEXT /* Name of the place where content is stored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the place */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the place */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the place */,
  "capacity" TEXT /* Storage capacity of the place */,
  "used_space" TEXT /* Used space in the place */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Whether the place is online or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("place_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotation_attributes" (
  "anno_attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the annotation attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the annotation attribute */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the annotation attribute */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Whether the annotation attribute is required or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anno_attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "flag_name" TEXT /* Name of the flag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flag */,
  "flag_description" TEXT /* Longer description of the flag */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Whether the flag is critical or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_expiration" (
  "expiration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration setting */,
  "expiration_value" INTEGER /* Expiration value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration setting */,
  "expiration_type" TEXT /* Type of expiration (e.g., days, weeks, months) */,
  "notification_period" INTEGER /* Number of days before expiration when a notification should be sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., document, image, video) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "type_description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the content type */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the content type is the default or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content creator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the content was accessed */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being annotated */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was added */,
  "annotator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "annotation_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the annotation */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Whether the annotation is public or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_annotator_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., content creator, reviewer, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "role_description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the role is the default or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
